title: Django_project
purpose: Tutorial-driven Django practice repo containing small exploratory projects, including a stock API example and a separate music-site scaffold.
features: Django project structure with separate practice projects under one repo
Simple stock model with ticker, open, close, and volume fields
API-style stock list view using Django REST Framework response patterns
Local SQLite-backed development setup suitable for framework learning
current_work_guess: The repo reads as framework-learning work rather than an actively evolving product.
graph_stats: 71 nodes · 66 edges · 25 communities (15 shown, 10 thin omitted)
suggested_next_steps: Document the Music_site scope if it should remain part of the repo story
Add a small API usage example if you want the stock project to read more clearly on GitHub
